verdict_reason: If 2.43 were removed and only the chapter thesis plus 2.41 (resolved buddhi) plus 2.42 (closure-clause speakers) plus 2.44 (consequence) remained, would the engineering analog be reconstructible? No. The 'constitutive identity-shift around the fruit-loop' diagnostic requires precisely 2.43's kāmātman + bhoga-aiśvarya-gati pair. 2.42 names the speakers and the closure clause; 2.43 names what specific trajectory their attachment produces. The promo-cycle constitutive-shift framing cannot be derived from 2.42's avipaścit-and-closure framing alone. PASS.
